title: Greaves Cotton is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Greaves Cotton is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Quality Control Engineer looking for your next big career move? Greaves Cotton in Jaipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Greaves Cotton:
Greaves Cotton is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Greaves Cotton!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
